body.title: Book ch5: add configurable frontend shim to platform description
body.result: Added config layout (uu.cfg + per-device) and configurable frontend shim sections to Chapter 5
body.description:
Update lab/docs/the_ownership_gap/6.Platform.md (Chapter 5) to describe: (1) the three entry points (./igor, ./superclaude, ./uu) and the zero-config startup principle — clone → run → works; (2) the configurable frontend shim — any agent gets the same console option via config, not bespoke UI per agent; (3) the uu.cfg global + per-device config.cfg convention; (4) ./uu as the human-facing Librarian chat surface — 'what do I know about X?' for non-technical users.

**Affected files:** lab/docs/the_ownership_gap/6.Platform.md
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** update existing launcher/config sections + add frontend shim section; update version timestamp to current MT
**Test plan:** read file and verify launcher UX, config layout, and frontend shim sections present; version stamp updated
